siteInfo.introText: GGN Solutions Inc. has partnered with local hotels, motels, and short-term rentals near Lead, SD to make it easy for our crew to find and book accommodation during the project. Browse the options below and click through to book directly with the provider.

listings.name: Blackstone Lodge & Suites
listings.description: Hotel in Lead with outdoor hot tubs, on-site lounge, free hot breakfast, weekend shuttle to Deadwood, free WiFi, ample parking, and pet-friendly rooms.

listings.name: Example Motel Name
listings.description: Short description of the motel, amenities, and what makes it convenient for our crew.

listings.name: Example Airbnb Listing
listings.description: Short description of the rental, number of bedrooms, and notes for crew sharing a unit.
